Video.summary: Hang on tight! Epic freestyle action takes center stage at the Florida Citrus Bowl, on January 30, 2010.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: The dirt is ready and the engines are roaring as Monster Jam takes over loanDepot park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 8. Witness the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series East as drivers battle across three intense stages: JCB Racing, the Skills Challenge, and Freestyle. Rivals like Adam Anderson and Tristan England look to defend their dominance, while fierce competitors like Jamie Sullivan and Chris Koehler push their 1,500-horsepower machines to the absolute edge to claim the BKT overall event championship. Don't miss a second of the gravity-defying stunts and heart-pounding action in this electric stadium environment.
Video.title: loanDepot Park - Miami, FL

Video.summary: The intensity reaches a fever pitch at the Save Mart Center as Fresno hosts Round 10 of the Arena Championship Series West. Experience a masterclass in technical driving as the 2025 Arena Racer of the Year, Blake Granger, attempts a historic sweep of the night's competitions. From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying stunts of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every driver—including fan favorites like Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Armando Castro in El Toro Loco—pushes their 12,000-pound machine to the limit. Witness heart-stopping "nose wheelies," backflips, and "moonwalks" in an action-packed event that culminates in an electric Freestyle finale.
Video.title: Save Mart Center - Fresno, CA

Video.summary: El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez leads the charge as Arena Championship Series West heads to the Golden 1 Center in Sacramento, California. Lainez will need to hold off Earth Shaker’s Tristan England who looks to reclaim the top spot in the series points standings.
Video.title: Golden 1 Center - Sacramento, CA

Video.summary: Two new trucks take to the dirt for the first time on this episode of Monster Jam.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing and Two-Wheel

Image.alt: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing and Two-Wheel
Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing and Two-Wheel
Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing and Two-Wheel

Video.summary: Catch the epic freestyle action from Gillette Stadium on June 25, 2016.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out the racing freestyle action from Angel Stadium on January 10, 2014.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Inglewood, CA is the next stop for Monster Jam Primetime with all the racing, skills, and freestyle action!
Video.title: Sofi Stadium - Inglewood, CA

Video.summary: During Monster Jam's World Finals II, trucks and drivers compete in freestyle events.
Video.title: World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

World Finals XIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2

Video.title: World Finals 1 - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Part 2

World Finals 1 - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Part 2

Video.summary: All the freestyle action from Monster Jam World Finals 12 on March 26, 2011.
Video.title: World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1/2

Image.alt: World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1/2
World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1/2
World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1/2

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series Central heads to New York as the series points battle continues at UBS Arena in Belmont Park. Scooby Doo’s Brianna Mahon and El Toro Loco’s Fernando Martinez attempt to chip away at the points lead held by Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson. The second-generation Grave Digger driver looks for his series-leading 17th event win.
Video.title: UBS Arena - Belmont Park, NY

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2007 season kicks off with epic racing and freestyle action from Minneapolis, MN, on December 2, 2006.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Hold onto your seats because Monster Jam's 2002 season continues with freestyle action in the Gateway City of St. Louis.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 17 of the Stadium Championship Series, at LoanDepot Park in Miami, FL.
Video.title: LoanDepot Park - Miami, FL

Video.summary: Don't miss your favorite trucks and drivers compete with freestyle action from St. Louis, MO, on February 16, 2008.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 3 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Petco Park, in San Diego, CA.
Video.title: Ring Central Coliseum - Oakland, CA

Video.summary: Check out all the racing and freestyle Monster Jam action from the Saturday night show at Bridgestone Arena on January 6, 2018.
Video.title: Bridgestone Arena - Nashville, TN - Triple Threat

Video.summary: Monster Jam has arrived in what is considered to be the motor sports capitol of the world, Indianapolis, Indiana.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: A Monster Jam all-star lineup is on hand at the Silverdome and they're gunning for the world championship.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into MetLife Stadium on June 16, 2012 with racing fun!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss Monster Jam's 2010 season opener with epic racing action from University of Phoenix Stadium, on August 1, 2009.
Video.title: University of Phoenix - Glendale, AZ - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss all the epic freestyle action from the Florida Citrus Bowl, on January 28, 2006.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam spectacle unfolds in Lincoln with high-stakes racing and intense rivalries. Fearless drivers battle for supremacy in JCB Racing. Standout moments and dramatic saves keep viewers on the edge of their seats. Experience the roar of the crowd and the adrenaline of each competition.
Video.title: Monster Jam REPLAY | Lincoln
